mapper.sql: id, analysis_id, source_type, source_id, review_id, product_id, product_name, review_text, image_url, risk_type, risk_level, sentiment_label, confidence, conflict_score, status, handler, handle_note, created_time, updated_time, deleted
mapper.insert:
insert ignore into litemall_ai_review_risk_task
analysis_id, source_type, source_id, review_id, product_id, product_name, review_text, image_url, risk_type, risk_level, sentiment_label, confidence, conflict_score, status, handler, handle_note, created_time, updated_time, deleted,
#{analysisId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{sourceType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sourceId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{reviewId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{productId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{productName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{reviewText,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, #{imageUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{riskType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{riskLevel,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sentimentLabel,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{confidence,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{conflictScore,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{handler,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{handleNote,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createdTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updatedTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{deleted,jdbcType=BIT},
mapper.update: update litemall_ai_review_risk_task set status = #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, handler = #{handler,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, handle_note = #{handleNote,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, updated_time = now() where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER} and deleted = 0
mapper.select: select status as name, count(1) as value from litemall_ai_review_risk_task where deleted = 0 group by status
select risk_level as name, count(1) as value from litemall_ai_review_risk_task where deleted = 0 group by risk_level
